entries.gt_da9fa05d8437b4: The lift recognizes signature, stamp, and sometimes gunfire. I do not certify the last one.
entries.gt_05553a0a1e0632: A Paragraph has taken root in the rear line. It fires amendments down an open line, so do not stand in the corridor like an application.
entries.gt_f77f7702e32005: Kill it or bypass it - the access order will become an event, not a rumor.
entries.gt_fca82c3a483f92: The cabin is certified. Do not argue with the button out loud.
entries.gt_dd4021dec1c932: The Paragraph has been written off. Now the line is just a line again, until someone reads it.
entries.gt_5218ba50f899c0: Semyon Marshrutny: "An official pass stub, and I will issue a route paper. It will not cancel the dangerous floor, but you will have something to show at the post."
entries.gt_0017a640a774a7: Inspector Countermarket: "Take the decree to Marta Vosmaya at Market 88. Warn her or pressure her - the paper will change the trade route either way."
entries.gt_3672d5e7ec942f: Klavdia Ukrytnaya: "Bring the shelter list. Legal, stolen, or rewritten - before the siren, place matters more than handwriting."
entries.gt_5711632789f7d3: Notary Kabinny: "Clear one Paragraph or Stamp-Eater by the rear line. The Paragraph shoots straight, the Stamp-Eater goes for documents - use corners."
entries.gt_49bba060155357: The Stamp-Eater goes for expensive paper. The Paragraph shoots along a straight line: corner, cabinet, door.
entries.gt_6582a1ba64c44e: A route pass does not open the floor. It convinces the lift you are not an accident.
entries.gt_a5d162d124fa56: The airlock accepts three arguments: an official stub, someone else's key from the safe, or quiet passage through the side door.
entries.gt_551d118c536aec: The Stamp-Eater scents valuable papers. Extra documents are better left in a box, or keep the monster at distance.
entries.gt_8e86082d35b9d4: The route has been entered. If the lift argues, show paper, not fear.
entries.gt_6bed45d2ff4476: Your stub is already walking through the log faster than you are.
entries.gt_ec02a751075115: Black Market 88 lives on paper no one presents twice.
entries.gt_1b07a2a0510bbe: You will take the decree to Marta Vosmaya. Help the inspection or warn the market - to the log, the route itself is what matters.
entries.gt_f7f5e63cc21592: The Paragraph strikes along a straight line. Break the line with a cabinet, corner, or door.
entries.gt_d03b5ce04a71e0: The market received the paper. Now it makes less noise, but costs more.
entries.gt_6d94528877fe0e: The decree went downward. That means return paper will come too.
entries.gt_697de5d6588915: The shelter list is always longer than the room. My job is deciding whose surname is let in first.
entries.gt_51a7f4df9fe390: Bring the list before the siren. A forgery saves a place, but afterward audit looks for a surname.
entries.gt_af7c8a3b4ddcc5: The Stamp-Eater does not like empty hands. If you are carrying a list, do not run beside its teeth.
entries.gt_8f75a36fc9256b: The surname is entered in pencil. Pencil has already survived two samosbors.
entries.gt_9b5c2ad9a3996c: If the siren starts here, look for a door, not justice.
entries.gt_7356332c214571: Neighbor Woman with a Wet Kerchief
entries.gt_7d458aaac454dd: Cartridges are not born. We melt casings, nails, and someone else's silence.
entries.gt_497645b2640c87: You can buy quietly. You can help with metal. You can turn us in to the Liquidator behind the door.
entries.gt_04cbe89d8f9918: Do not touch the hot box. That is not a reserve, it is a reason for a fight.
entries.gt_7699f3b80e1d89: Bring sheet metal to the hot box and I will pour off some nines before rounds return.
entries.gt_83a5972b65db56: If the siren starts singing, run. The smelter is not a shelter.
entries.gt_76abf04dcdd172: The metal went to work. Now we have six honest shots and a new reason to keep quiet.
entries.gt_6ad738e2afcacc: Take the cartridges wisely. A PPSh will eat them faster than you can regret it.
entries.gt_d71a84a918d385: I do not see a smelter. I see illegal noise, until there is paper.
entries.gt_34ae3c35dee550: Bring a denunciation or the sales notebook, and I will close the cabinet by protocol.
entries.gt_f7b2818026b8ea: Buy from Gesha and you become a customer. Steal and you become a target.
entries.gt_cd2c00643533cb: Hot cartridges jam weapons and conversations. Both cases are treated with an order.
entries.gt_dd9fe0851b59a2: If shooting starts here, I will close the door first, then the list.
entries.gt_ba91d3c94e24ef: There is paper. Now this is not a rumor, but an inspection.
entries.gt_241f7c8aa1c670: Cartridges issued for the report. Do not spend them on witnesses.
entries.gt_6e353752d6a868: Gesha Gilza: "Sheet metal into the hot box. There will be cartridges, but quietly."
entries.gt_b19900ebaeab1c: Polina Obkhodnaya: "I need a denunciation on the casing smelter. Without paper I hear only repairs."
entries.gt_7a8504d1730ce7: obtain an extract from the ration register
entries.gt_8d32739081a2f5: This is not an altar, it is a kitchen. Bread will not carry itself by list.
entries.gt_3fe0e0a4d1ccdb: Keys on the nail, pots to the neighbors, do not mix up the surnames.
entries.gt_b86432606bc818: A fake ration card will do. I will enter you in the statement as if you had always carried a sack.
entries.gt_e2465dac2369e2: Steal from the cabinet in front of Nyura and she keeps quiet louder than a Liquidator.
entries.gt_171c27f3a249cb: Chernobog does not wash cauldrons. So we do.
entries.gt_4fa16f7fd92b13: The card is straight. Take bread and do not ask whose pot is in there.
entries.gt_63afd2717605f0: If anyone asks, you were returning empty jars. That sounds almost holy.
entries.gt_85197b0763d3e0: I do not go in. You can see more from the door than from the stove.
entries.gt_edda360c08fe23: Zina carries bread not to children, but to those who whisper under the stairs.
entries.gt_1cdd10af0563fa: Bring their kitchen list and I will give it to those who know how to read aloud.
entries.gt_b07cf0755cb622: You can steal bread. You can return bread. The most frightening option is pretending there is no kitchen.
entries.gt_7368504c8d70af: The pot with the blue lid is mine. They "borrowed it until the sign".
entries.gt_9980f28b08c2eb: The list has left the kitchen. Now the door is looking at more than just you.
entries.gt_02131a3ff95fa8: If they ask, I will say I was counting spoons.
entries.gt_a77de2876a2624: Zina Kladovaya: "A fake ration card, and I will enter you in the kitchen statement without a fight."
entries.gt_ce6cfc58e8af7c: Nyura In-the-Doorway: "Put the cell kitchen list on the table. Let them count the bread in front of people."
entries.gt_33444b24637540: Denunciation Box for the Quiet Neighbor
entries.gt_5e7d07c9e8d128: There is an extra neighbor in the queue. He stands silently until someone comes to him for salt.
entries.gt_20aed017b41e56: The screen by the door shows the queue, but not his shoulders. Even an old television does not lie like that.
entries.gt_042a1fb8fea7f7: I hung a lamp and left the passage clear. If he jerks, run to the door, not the wall.
entries.gt_ff47390d529236: The fake pass in his pocket is like skin: seems his own, but the typeface is someone else's.
entries.gt_de81831957f106: Now the queue is at least human. Not for long, but you can hear it right away.
entries.gt_35d57b0dd428a6: Do not laugh at my box. The detector squealed before people did.
entries.gt_2c63051e67dff7: Raya Suspicious: "Kill the quiet neighbor in the room of someone else's queue. Do not get close until you are ready to run."
entries.gt_9f5ed8c1b46a81: Apartments: room of someone else's queue, a screen without reflection, and a denunciation box at the entrance; keep the exit clear.
entries.gt_6114caf03ceb0e: The quiet neighbor from someone else's queue was exposed and killed.
entries.gt_486ecc079c9f28: They collect children here whom the corridor returned without parents.
entries.gt_2f0fcc8dc60351: Zhenya has been silent since the last siren. He needs water and bread, not questions.
entries.gt_8fd3e46116597c: Bring two bottles of water. I will scrape up bread; without water, children give up faster.
entries.gt_cea9867f430745: I write names on the wall. The wall erases only those no one is looking for anymore.
entries.gt_3f0d6678d42248: The Liquidators say evacuation comes later. Children have a shorter later than adults.
entries.gt_d4f218ece2e3da: Zhenya ate. Now he looks at the door, not through it.
entries.gt_bca45a9dca5f69: If you find a child's map, do not laugh. Children draw exits more accurately than adults.
entries.gt_955edebf575ccf: Vera Poteryashkina: "Two bottles of water for the children, before the corridor takes them."
entries.gt_49fcb366dee367: Vera's children received water; Zhenya survived the fever and trusted you with a pencil route.
entries.gt_9947db8311e698: Vera Poteryashkina: "Tell Nina {dir}: Zhenya is drinking and can walk. Without that, she will not open the children's medicine reserve."
entries.gt_0e6232d408445f: Apartments: from the lost child's corner, reach the Pharmacy Exchange and talk to Nina.
entries.gt_252a22f7361a62: Vera vouched for the player to Nina Tabletkina.
entries.gt_a3bb1301433eeb: Speak quieter: by the kitchen, the Liquidator counts not words, but those who lingered by the list.
entries.gt_0521254e02a978: Everything here rests on a wet statement. If the paper dries, a queue appears; if it soaks, an order appears.
entries.gt_7c166846b816ff: We need one hundred ballots. Not for a holiday: without them, the neighbors will be counted by the boots at the door again.
entries.gt_b7ebcbb684df95: Every vote counts, because the meter by the standpipe has long been writing in favor of those with holsters.
entries.gt_82242dc6fa8114: They hold the cartridge box. We hold the kitchen, the water, and the surnames of those who still answer.
entries.gt_a641680f398140: A ballot is not salvation. It is a slip of paper that is harder to knock out of a hand while neighbors are watching.
entries.gt_5fafcc7d7fa7f6: The Liquidator summary will call this disorder. We will call it a queue where people sign for themselves.
entries.gt_9782b4b05433cc: When we gather the votes, we learn whom the floor still remembers alive, and whom it has already written off into the fog.
entries.gt_cac7b8a49b3382: Thank you. The ballots are in the folder, the folder is in a dry bag, and the bag is not to be shown by the standpipe.
entries.gt_ef9d74444aa1ad: The count passed. The floor is louder on paper than in the corridor, and they have already noticed.
entries.gt_d4c014d8b8fdf7: If your surname can still be read, hold it tighter than a coupon.
entries.gt_49e7d6c484882b: Now the folder has to reach the kitchen without drowning in the first bucket.
entries.gt_17b7ce715a7651: Navelny: "Collect 100 ballots. Let the queue by the standpipe count the living itself, before the Liquidators do it."
entries.gt_d80768a2876c6a: I keep porridge in my pocket until the rats find it. You need some?
entries.gt_f1c6715d5fddd8: How are you here, alive? Eyes are normal, just tired.
entries.gt_eaae9863aadb9b: Do not take offense if I stand close. In the corridor they cut you off at once otherwise.
entries.gt_95973f8ba89740: The porridge was warm in the morning. Now it is just honest.
entries.gt_f4da44ee0d805d: Eat. With an empty stomach, the siren sounds closer.
entries.gt_adb532966e7f52: I mean well. My knife is for the door, not people, unless people start first.
entries.gt_c73751ffb01459: Your own people here are those who share before the all-clear. After the all-clear it is already too late to meet.
entries.gt_bb7762258204cc: I brought bread and cigarettes. For those, a neighbor sometimes becomes a neighbor.
entries.gt_17d4ac3b0ab499: Do not shout. The walls are thin, and some walls answer.
entries.gt_362a8e4340c7f3: We will smoke by the shaft, just put the ash in the jar. Klava scolds for dirt worse than rounds.
entries.gt_1bc4a21aaa6b1f: Drop by if you have something to share. I am usually here until the corridor changes its mind.
entries.gt_6ef9b12382fdf8: The porridge is getting cold, but still edible. That is rare.
entries.gt_ec284e7a538480: If a crush starts by the standpipe, keep to the wall and do not argue with wet hands.
entries.gt_5609b04d529e92: Quiet. The machine is louder than samosbor, but the Liquidators hear only paper.
entries.gt_2002e8ffb0c0a2: We print passes, complaints, obituaries, and canteen menus. The difference is the typeface.
entries.gt_b8ed09734f461a: I need notes with real stamps. Ten of them, no fewer.
entries.gt_9f1c9cbbb49b68: A fake document works exactly until the first person who can read.
entries.gt_ad615bc6234498: If the paper smells damp, the District Council accepted it without questions.
entries.gt_9191ab48a1c77a: For two blank forms, I will make an audit order. Do not wave it around in front of Liquidators.
entries.gt_f8570d0d29e140: The stamps fit. Now we have documents for the absence of documents.
entries.gt_88b9ada357990f: Take the book or the order. They have blank pages, but an official binding.
entries.gt_b1e101bef0fdd1: Dima Pechatnik: "Bring ten other people's notes. We will make paper after which security asks fewer questions."
entries.gt_0c176e6c34e8a4: Dima Pechatnik: "Two blank forms, and I will print an audit order. Works quietly until the stamp is compared with a real one."
entries.gt_40b645601f0cad: Dima Pechatnik issued a fake audit order
entries.gt_e83effbd66c6fd: Silent Man with a Milk Can
entries.gt_57f32577283af4: The queue does not move. It breathes, but it does not move.
entries.gt_69d6d2efa9f6f3: By the statement, there are twelve bottles of water; on the floor, eight. So the statement lies, or the floor drinks.
entries.gt_dbe770aef14fcd: The Liquidators demand order. The Wild demand it now. I demand more water.
entries.gt_e7ea9bbceb4282: Five bottles of water will save this corridor from a fight for ten minutes. I promise nothing more.
entries.gt_f5ede718d0e8f2: A coupon without a stamp is not a coupon. A stamp without bread is not food either.
entries.gt_14e24693c6ee63: At the window, water buys a place; bread buys a jump. The first is remembered kindly, the second with elbows.
entries.gt_71dce8f604a7e3: The water was brought. Now they argue more quietly.
entries.gt_606aa136729f48: If you hear the siren, do not stand in the queue. The queue is not a shelter.
entries.gt_9babf6dfdd7ae8: Galina Talonnitsa: "Bring five bottles of water, before the queue becomes a riot."
entries.gt_26dcf0ba314e51: Apartments: Coupon Issue Point, Galina's queue, and the ration-register cashbox.
entries.gt_3f91883591da86: The ration queue was held with water before the riot.
entries.gt_c330babd8e2272: Galina Talonnitsa: "Bring an extract from the ration register. If the list lies, the queue will start eating itself."
entries.gt_92a4c4737b5a35: Apartments: Galina's cashbox by the ration queue stores the extract, coupons, and a forged card.
entries.gt_d7fc75f5263534: The ration register was checked in front of the queue.
entries.gt_f6b59860ccb3be: Hello. Zoya Arkadyevna. The Red Corner is now a classroom, a storehouse, and a quiet queue all at once.
entries.gt_0d35991b655d06: Children rarely come here: after the siren, they look at the door first, then at the board.
entries.gt_e90174daade5a9: We need twenty-five ballots. Not for elections, for an exercise: surname, date, who saw it.
entries.gt_935894a1499f94: Navelny dries signatures, Zhirinovsky counts shadows. I teach children not to lose their line in the list.
entries.gt_beda98adc97eef: If there is an empty square in the notebook, someone else's decision quickly gets written there.
entries.gt_59be46a498b7b5: No running at recess. At recess, you listen for rounds coming down the corridor.
entries.gt_c52d4e911f978d: The textbooks are damp, but the letters still hold. People hold worse without letters.
entries.gt_4b32dc7fd2d4ca: Whoever can read a statement at least understands when they have already been sold.
entries.gt_41c61df487d415: Thank you. Now the class will hold a ballot dictation without shouting from the corridor.
entries.gt_c2e67366247242: Take some tea. Cold, but at least not from the standpipe.
entries.gt_f2d578e187d359: If you find old textbooks, bring them dry. I am already saving wet ones sheet by sheet.
entries.gt_e3c769df8140f6: The children will see that paper can be filled in, not only feared.
entries.gt_75b78637ac0cd1: Zoya Arkadyevna: "Bring 25 ballots. The children will learn to count people, not only coupons."
entries.gt_c67fdde7d19e21: Hey, which landing are you from? Around here they count strangers by the door creak.
entries.gt_7b8483ad854791: This is our piece of corridor while the boys are by the lift and the lower hermodoor is not jammed.
entries.gt_40543f4fde7347: Got a smoke? Bring ten packs and you pass without extra questions.
entries.gt_299cf9caf5aff0: Zhirinovsky shouts, Navelny dries paper, and water belongs to whoever holds the passage.
entries.gt_389280033013e0: Our order is simple: corridor first, canister second, conversation third.
entries.gt_8cab808d11a22d: It is tight by the kitchen today. Do not push in empty-handed; a stool is faster than words there.
entries.gt_433e567f61d13c: I am no friend to a Liquidator. But if he is looking this way, it is better to keep the knife in your pocket.
entries.gt_a67cfb9a158dc6: The neighbors hear everything. So smile quietly and do not clink bottles.
entries.gt_4db88b877788be: The packs are in place. Now they will not touch you by the lift, unless you start it yourself.
entries.gt_c1e1bc4a691d32: If they squeeze you at the water point, say: Gray saw it. Sometimes that is enough.
entries.gt_bdb99fcdf3eeb2: The cigarettes are dry, so the deal is honest. For this floor, almost a holiday.
entries.gt_14e50753428a08: Gray: "Ten packs of cigarettes. I will pay with passage by the lift and silence at the water point."
entries.gt_c844bc9988d88a: It grew tight by the standpipe: dry canisters rattled like weapons.
entries.gt_7c5c6409a19777: The barricade creaked: the passage is no longer being defended with words.
entries.gt_fc3540f6d501f1: A wet rumor blew out of the print room: witnesses scattered, two stayed with knives.
entries.gt_62ad855eb86a1e: At the communal kitchen, the argument turned to iron: keep to the wall.
entries.gt_5b5cf27fdda023: A whisper started in the neighboring queue: someone is already holding a pipe as more than a tool.
entries.gt_84ca2e890101b0: The ration queue's edge broke: several residents pushed toward the cashbox.
entries.gt_ce17ddb311eecd: Come in, just do not slam the door. The neighbors hear better than a Liquidator report.
entries.gt_99a69d341a8d76: They are dividing the stove in the kitchen again. I keep my pot under the bed; safer that way.
entries.gt_ee81019037de99: No sugar, the yeast is angry, the bread still endures. Bring eight loaves and the mash will rise.
entries.gt_d2e45a5245122f: My compote is not for a holiday. It warms hands after the queue and loosens tongues before a deal.
entries.gt_6ffff63924609a: Zhirinovsky makes noise about raids, and Serygin sniffs bottles. So we speak in half-voice.
entries.gt_9ce16b3caa55ed: If the siren starts, moonshine will not save you. But it is warmer running to the hermodoor with it.
entries.gt_ac7a912e8adcba: Children do not come here. The sweet smell is worse for them than the truth.
entries.gt_d47e5b90cba05d: Do not steal bread from Vera's lost ones. They already have a corner instead of a home.
entries.gt_1a33a85b232f6a: The bread went into the barrel. Until the next siren, the kitchen will smell of more than fear.
entries.gt_1e11c564768442: Do not whisper about me to the Liquidators. They will seal it first, then taste it.
entries.gt_55506ffabe6291: If your head cracks after the corridor, ask quietly. I do not keep pills on display.
entries.gt_bf74c613c8fc4d: Take the compote and do not rattle the bottle in the queue. Dry glass carries far.
entries.gt_61847c01630cbb: Aunt Klava: "Eight loaves of bread into the barrel. For that I will pour compote and not ask where the bread came from."
entries.gt_10c6ee9cb0161f: ABSOLUTELY! Step away from the door. Through your noise I cannot hear where the wall is moving.
entries.gt_1d407da67f0066: I am not loud for beauty. When the siren is silent, a loud voice replaces the rounds log.
entries.gt_bbd060e06d404c: Navelny collects ballots, and Shadows collect faces. Guess who works faster at night.
entries.gt_293aff6e10ad36: First mold in the kitchen, then a shadow in the corner, then a neighbor asking for salt in someone else's voice.
entries.gt_dad5696c337f78: Bring five marks on Shadows. Do not haul heads in: the corridor already smells after cleanup.
entries.gt_d558f0adeb2449: Apartments for everyone? First working hermodoors, dry filters, and whole peepholes for everyone.
entries.gt_e702bde0ed4c3b: If the work order cannot keep up, order comes with a sawn-off, an accounting log, and two witnesses.
entries.gt_89e871ca41664c: I shout because the quiet ones here are the first written down as missing in unnumbered rooms.
entries.gt_de51fbb21b75bf: ABSOLUTELY! Five shadows written off. Now the statement at least resembles the truth.
entries.gt_1bed2afaafd1a4: Here, take a cigarette. Not a reward, a mark: you saw where the wall was not a wall.
entries.gt_90de850169b89b: If there is anyone else to clean out, first show the route, ammo reserve, and who closes the door behind us.
entries.gt_34b93853c0d15f: Zhirinovsky: "ABSOLUTELY! Write off five Shadows. Without a clean passage, the queue will not survive to the kitchen."
entries.gt_60887b552e17b3: Ah, a visitor... Sorry, do you have Form 7-B clearance? Without it, no chance.
entries.gt_77f009d2761ecf: I am Kafkin. Archivist. Cataloguing cases since... yes, since late forty-nine.
entries.gt_b3df3b107a137f: Cases disappear. Cabinet No. 14 was there yesterday. Today it is gone. And there is a wall in its place.
entries.gt_33fbdace9ed172: Ten notes. Bring them. Any notes. I will file them into the case - that is procedure.
entries.gt_b7978e44b9c306: Otherwise the form will not close. Otherwise - INSOMNIA. And I already do not sleep.
entries.gt_725a8ec0c52e4e: The case is filed. The form is closed. Thank you.
entries.gt_6a1717acb34fc5: If you find strange documents, bring them. Any documents.
entries.gt_847bc523e0cdd9: Quiet in the corridor. Minister Rotenbergov dislikes noise.
entries.gt_e8e5da0548abaa: Kafkin: "Ten notes. I will file them into the case. Otherwise the form will not close."
entries.gt_5590d1f7642634: pressure the window with an order
entries.gt_b5f0dd40fd391f: hand the statement to the Liquidators
entries.gt_487e298af16a37: seal the leak with a planted act
entries.gt_c7ca1dc07eea1d: break open the NII sample cage
entries.gt_3d4baad32932ef: Hello, young man! Are you here for lunch or with a complaint? Everything here is by coupon.
entries.gt_b11604d924d115: I am Glafira. Thirty years at the buffet. I have outlasted all the ministers. And all the beasts.
entries.gt_c712b1a28a88a4: We have trouble. The compote is running out. The storeroom clerk vanished - no delivery for the third day.
entries.gt_b6f9cada437ebc: Bring six bottles of compote. Wherever you find them, take them there. A minister without compote is a beast.
entries.gt_b1e1dc13274133: And I will throw in some cutlets for you. Maybe tell you a little secret about the director too.
entries.gt_4580be83280e6c: Eat up, dear. Today's cutlets are fresh. Almost.
entries.gt_711a1937032a3f: The director? They say he walks in the archive with a ghost. But hush.
entries.gt_031ea2e75a7d5e: Come by. I will always pour tea.
entries.gt_e5385a2850decb: Glafira: "Six bottles of compote to the buffet. A minister without compote is a beast."
entries.gt_5e5eddb77cb157: Sit down. The chair is not required to be yours, but it has already testified.
entries.gt_482d90c71abc40: I am Lidia Protokolnaya. I ask the questions. The answers sometimes come from the wall.
entries.gt_f1a5c883539a30: Every protocol has a shadow. If the shadow is longer than the text, we call Liquidators.
entries.gt_1a494a85c1c8b5: There is no suspect sitting in the cabinet. There is a version of events no one signed.
entries.gt_21727395b7612a: We need bandages. The last witness proved that paper cuts deeper than glass.
entries.gt_632de25b7393f7: If you hear knocking from the portrait, do not answer with your surname.
entries.gt_247a2dd399b78b: I do not raise my voice. The room amplifies the needed words itself.
entries.gt_87f354ade6b1b1: The door opens outward only for those who have not changed their testimony.
entries.gt_18f9dc1b877ef0: Bandages accepted. The interrogation can continue without extra stains.
entries.gt_637c5dc7740036: You answered quickly. That is suspicious, but convenient.
entries.gt_8af346b3a69183: When the protocol wants to leave, shoot the hinge.
entries.gt_15d54fe6691380: Lidia Protokolnaya: "Three bandages to the interrogation room. Paper is cutting witnesses today."
entries.gt_ccf714e659e96b: Lidia Protokolnaya: "A Shadow broke loose in the interrogation room. Kill it before it signs us."
entries.gt_5670dc7dced30f: Card File for Dumping Extra Forms
entries.gt_ceb8b46ff9d0e6: A shelter is considered valid if a cabinet stands between the citizen and the desk.
entries.gt_b6d77c8e41a3bb: Card File L-47: tokens and sorties
entries.gt_da7175cea9b63d: Minister Rotenbergov: "Emergency tax. Bring 1,000,000 rubles: seals, water, and quiet in the archive are needed."
entries.gt_05c66cd2280e6e: General Secretary Khrushchev. Report briefly: I have a lift behind the door and three windows without a stamp.
entries.gt_07d8ea3d61f9b6: The house stands not because it is beautiful. Every day it is propped up by standpipes, work orders, and people with no time to argue.
entries.gt_698a274f9b3897: Every standpipe, assembly hall, and collector has been entered in the plan. Even the ones that move into another cabinet at night.
entries.gt_8e319219ab4afe: In the Collectors, Makhno cuts cable, takes rations, and breaks seals. Then he calls it freedom.
entries.gt_64eca34d197f75: Remove Makhno. Without the ataman, they will have a storehouse, a queue, and fear of Liquidators.
entries.gt_dc361f6701a512: Makhno has been written off. The cable men are already asking for guards, not slogans.
entries.gt_25e918ed6108a5: Order is when the work order is closed before the siren and no one carries a seal in their pocket.
entries.gt_36411f0a50afa3: The bonus is in the cabinet. Do not linger by the window: the queue knows how to listen.
entries.gt_5cc7f33335ccb0: Finance Minister Rotenbergov. Speak briefly: the budget has a draft.
entries.gt_30a55b4007a09f: In GIGAHRUSH everything is taxed: water, silence, a place in queue, even the lift button.
entries.gt_0231992ae401a1: When the balance does not add up, the archive gets wet first. Only then do people run with sealant.
entries.gt_645dc0919c6ac6: One million rubles are needed. Officially, an emergency levy; in practice, the purchase of seals, water, and silence.
entries.gt_d084d4bdd99bab: Do not confuse an empty pocket with a clean receipt. The window will ask for a surname anyway.
entries.gt_01ac47fe9a6629: The amount has arrived. Accounting stopped holding the door with a cabinet.
entries.gt_e854412b51f89c: Financial discipline is when communal charges are paid before the water comes for a signature.
entries.gt_4792b5fe7fc5b2: There will be new levies. The house is large, and there are never enough stamps.
entries.gt_bd6574847f51e5: General Secretary Khrushchev: "Makhno cuts cable and breaks seals in the Collectors. Remove the ataman before repairmen go there only with guards."
entries.gt_d6a37ed37b0743: Shh! Close the door. And do not turn around. The smoking room is the only place without cameras.
entries.gt_a61b59bbee4031: I am Aurora. I am investigating. Samosbor is not a natural phenomenon. It is an experiment.
entries.gt_3a447b68c933fe: The Ministry knows. It stays silent. Every report is fake. And I will prove it.
entries.gt_c3c0db45b10b54: Eight notes, any notes. From archives, offices, desks. I will find codes in them and send them to samizdat.
entries.gt_8e3673ec140249: If I disappear, continue the case. The smoking room will remain. Smoke does not lie.
entries.gt_f53e764d89a773: Thank you. Samizdat is already printing. The minister is furious, so everything is working.
entries.gt_fcbbf5594cb3e2: Light up. Today, we won one day.
entries.gt_454a0e30b4ddbe: If you find more compromat, bring it. I pay.
entries.gt_61661affc14b1d: Aurora: "Eight notes. Any notes. I will find codes in them and send them to samizdat."
entries.gt_399b4b74ded862: The attesting witness nodded, the log twitched. The forged sheet now works, but the witness saw the face.
entries.gt_7205b1879ae4df: The stamp-room audit raised the line about the forged sheet. There is use, no quiet.
entries.gt_2768a9164e34fa: Do not breathe on the stamps. Today they are sticky and nervous.
entries.gt_875df72980a25a: I am Zoya Surguchnaya. I put marks on paper, people, and sometimes doors.
entries.gt_8b2d6a5e30e294: A stamp does not confirm truth. It confirms that truth has become convenient for the cabinet.
entries.gt_9db7d1b804aa60: For a pass, you need a stub, a witness, and something red. There is ink, but the stamp holds on sealing wax.
entries.gt_0409478ace21ea: Bring notes. They will become pads under the stamp, so the desk does not scream.
entries.gt_0cdc7fce0e32f4: Security thinks it guards me. In fact it guards the stamp from me.
entries.gt_506e6573690fe8: The red carpet is not here for beauty. It shows where the stamp crawled at night.
entries.gt_582b63fcc1470b: If you hear a clap without paper, someone has received a refusal in advance.
entries.gt_b4c87b60203000: The stamp lay down straight. That is alarming.
entries.gt_9e167c1cb14275: If the paper starts heating up, do not put it by your heart.
entries.gt_f277776c1682a8: Vera will get the mark. The queue will get a reason.
entries.gt_b692596d8d8c3e: Stub accepted. Tell Vera: the stamp did not argue, only hissed.
entries.gt_9b571bd426ea17: Zoya Surguchnaya: "Five notes. We will put them under the stamp so it does not burn through the desk."
entries.gt_b0c5d0de66aec7: Zoya Surguchnaya: "Tell Osip Kartochny that the stamp recognized his box as existing."
entries.gt_afc7d49cfd29b7: Zoya Surguchnaya: "Two pieces of sealing wax. We will place a fake stamp before an attesting witness: the sheet will pass into the archive, but the log will wake up too."
entries.gt_4e57334f53f181: Zoya placed a fake stamp before a witness; the sheet works for the archive window, a fake weapons permit, and forgery buying.
entries.gt_28bf872b0f691e: Colonel Streltsov. Deputy minister for special operations. Listening.
entries.gt_944f86f8eba346: We have a problem. Spirits. Not ghosts - real ones, passing through marble.
entries.gt_59a8391172aff7: They were recorded behind the portrait gallery, but any four confirmed spirits count toward credit.
entries.gt_ea4a1ea243730e: Destroy four. This is a special assignment. I will personally oversee the reward.
entries.gt_b3eed55bf15245: The special operation was completed with excellent marks. The minister is pleased.
entries.gt_8be662e644854a: If you see spirits again, keep your distance and report to the living.
entries.gt_9d5780132c143a: You are now in the personal reserve. That is a privilege.
entries.gt_fb357355276874: Streltsov: "Four spirits. Wherever you meet them, destroy them there."
